crons.//: Drain hourly with a per-run cap that fits inside the IONOS hourly send limit. Synchronous app-generated emails (apply confirmations etc.) also count against that cap, so leave headroom: cap is 50/hr on day 0, 100/hr after day 7, 400/hr after day 14, 500/hr after day 30. Bump ?limit= as the mailbox ages.
